docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-03-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER OSBORNE, LINDA AS TO RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. PETITIONER LINDA OSBORNE'S PETITION FOR ORDER FOR RELIEF FROM CLAIM STATUE IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

MINI MINUTES:

JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL.
